summary: Associate Flutter Developer at Instance IT Solutions, experienced in building cross-platform mobile and web applications with Flutter and GetX. Skilled in Firebase, REST APIs, SDLC execution, and agile delivery, with a strong focus on clean code, problem-solving, and shipping reliable client solutions.

responsibilities: Develop cross-platform applications for Android, iOS, and Web using Flutter.
Participate in the full software development lifecycle from requirements gathering to implementation.
Write clean, testable, and maintainable code.
Apply agile practices to deliver high-quality solutions within deadlines.
Continuously learn and adapt to new technologies and industry changes.
Use analytical thinking and problem-solving skills to support innovative client solutions.

projects.name: Retail Business Management System
projects.description: A centralized system designed to manage inventory, production workflows, and point-of-sale operations for a fast-moving retail business. Built to replace manual processes and improve operational efficiency.

projects.name: Rehabilitation Project Management System
projects.description: A workflow-driven platform for managing large-scale relocation and rehabilitation processes, including geo-referenced planning, document automation, and multi-stage tracking.

projects.name: Parking Management & Allocation System
projects.description: A system for visualizing parking layouts and dynamically allocating spaces using intelligent mapping and optimization logic.

projects.name: Residential Community Management App
projects.description: A mobile application enabling residents and management to communicate efficiently through event updates, visitor tracking, and centralized notifications.

projects.name: 2D to 3D Architectural Visualization Platform
projects.description: A web platform that transforms 2D architectural plans into interactive 3D visualizations with geo-referenced mapping and structural insights.

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering in Information Technology
education.institution: Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel Institute of Technology

achievements.title: Silent Achiever Award
achievements.description: Recognized for consistently delivering excellent results and high-quality work.

achievements.title: On The Spot Award
achievements.description: Recognized for outstanding dedication and hard work.

open_source_contributions.name: smartpub
open_source_contributions.creator: Vatsal Jaganwala
open_source_contributions.description: A Flutter and Dart CLI tool that helps developers identify unused dependencies, organize pubspec.yaml, and maintain dependency hygiene through a safe, preview-first workflow.

open_source_contributions.name: flutter_logger_pro
open_source_contributions.creator: Vatsal Jaganwala
open_source_contributions.description: A structured logging solution for Flutter and Dart that enables developers to generate readable, formatted, and JSON-based logs with enhanced debugging capabilities across platforms.
